title: Wynnmaze
description: WynnMaze is a Wynncraft mod that enhances the player experience in the TCC raid's Room 2 maze by providing beginner-friendly gameplay for those new to the raid
body:
WynnMaze is a Wynncraft mod that enhances the player experience in the TCC raid's Room 2 maze.

- Guide feature for beginners
- supoort many language
 
- The Sender must meet 3 requirements:
1. Be within 5 blocks of the exit.
2. Speak the correct color name.
3. Broadcast the correct coordinates.(maybe via Wynntils)
- The Receiver only needs to have Wynnmaze installed to automatically trigger navigation.

========================================

- 新手引路功能
  
發送端需要滿足3個條件:
1. 在出口5格內
2. 說出正確的顏色
3. (用wynntils)發出正確座標

接收端需要有裝wynnmaze即可自動開啟導航


For any suggestions, please contact me via **Discord**: fenglingyu
